news.summary: Safe, previously known as Gnosis Safe, has introduced a new division named Safe Labs. This subsidiary aims to create high-quality self-custody products for businesses using its smart contract wallet technology.
news.headline: Safe introduces Safe Labs to create enterprise Ethereum wallets, expanding its self-custody solutions. #GnosisSafe #Ethereum

news.summary: In Beaumont, Texas, mJob, a prominent provider of construction field software, has unveiled mJob Essentials, offering top-tier software solutions to contractors regardless of their size.
news.headline: mJob launches mJob Essentials, providing construction field software for contractors of all sizes in Beaumont, Texas.
ECB's President Lagarde: We had extensive discussions on impact of disruption of supply chains.

news.summary: SmartRent, a company based in Phoenix, has introduced new technology aimed at helping operators in the real estate industry reduce waste and costs while supporting environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals. The AI-powered intelligence layer and enhanced energy tools provided by SmartRent are designed to assist operators in achieving these objectives. The company's innovation is set to make a significant impact in the industry, potentially leading to increased efficiency and sustainability.
news.headline: SmartRent introduces AI intelligence, energy tools to assist operators in reducing waste and cutting costs; improving ESG.

news.summary: Zinzino AB (publ.) has released its Annual Report for the year 2024 on June 5, 2025, in Gothenburg, Sweden. The report can be downloaded in English from the company's official website, www.zinzino.com. It provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance and strategic developments throughout the year. Interested stakeholders can access the report directly through the following link: https://www.zinzino.com/site/GB/en-GB/about/investor-relations/. This release signifies transparency and accountability to shareholders, with crucial information now readily available for review and analysis.
news.headline: Zinzino AB (publ.) releases 2024 Annual Report in English, now downloadable on website. Visit www.zinzino.com for details.

news.summary: Bain has identified significant trends that will transform the global retail industry by 2035. Businesses that capitalize on these opportunities are expected to emerge as future leaders. The report from Boston and London on June 5, 2025, discusses the profound changes expected to reshape the retail landscape. This transformative period will see businesses adapting to new strategies and technologies to stay competitive. The report highlights key factors that will influence the industry, impacting sales, consumer behavior, and market dynamics. The forecast reflects a shift towards digitalization and sustainability, with projections showing a potential increase in revenue and market share for forward-thinking companies. This evolution is projected to create a dynamic and competitive retail environment in the near future.
news.headline: Bain & Co. predicts six major disruptions in retail by 2035, reshaping the industry; those who adapt may become future winners.

news.summary: Company has made a strategic move to diversify its treasury holdings by incorporating a long-term digital store of value. This decision reflects the company's aim to broaden its financial portfolio. This move is significant as it will help in spreading risk and strengthening the company's position in terms of financial stability. This shift towards a digital store of value underscores the company's forward-thinking approach in adapting to evolving financial landscapes. Such a strategic decision is believed to enhance the company's financial resilience over time.
news.headline: Silo Pharma board approves buying Bitcoin as treasury asset for diversification and long-term value.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF) presented its latest platform advancements during Jamf Nation Live, the global customer event series held in the U.S. The event showcased innovations in artificial intelligence, automation, compliance, and identity management that revolutionize the deployment, management, and security of Apple devices at scale. The series will continue with events in Europe and Asia in the upcoming months, highlighting the company's commitment to advancing technology for its global customer base.
news.headline: Jamf displays AI-powered features and enhanced security at Jamf Nation Live, with global events in Europe and Asia ahead.
ECB's President Lagarde: We have not discussed neutral rate.

news.summary: CHANHASSEN, Minnesota - On June 5, 2025, Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten secondary offering. The offering comprises 20,000,000 shares of the company's common stock which will be sold by specific selling shareholders. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol LTH.
news.headline: Life Time priced secondary offering of 20M shares of common stock on June 5, 2025.

news.summary: StockX, a platform based in Detroit, announced on June 5, 2025, that they rejected over 370,000 products due to not meeting their verification standards. Additionally, more than 500,000 "bad" Asks were blocked from being listed on the marketplace in 2024. This news comes as StockX celebrates World Anticounterfeiting Day.
news.headline: StockX rejects nearly $10 million in fake sneakers in 2024, blocks over 370,000 products and 500,000 "bad" Asks from marketplace.

news.summary: Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed on June 5th, 2025, that they have expanded production for their FDA-cleared INSPIRA™ ART100 system. This move comes in anticipation of increased demand from a European governmental entity with whom the company is finalizing procurement talks. Inspira Technologies, listed on NASDAQ as IINN, specializes in life-support and diagnostic technologies. The ART100 system is at the center of this development, emphasizing the company's commitment to meeting growing market needs.
news.headline: Inspira Technologies increases ART100 system production to meet European demand in negotiation, FDA-cleared.

news.summary: Following significant investor interest, Circle has officially launched its public trading with multiple IPO upsizings to meet demand. Investors have shown strong interest in the offering, resulting in sizable increases in the initial public offering to accommodate this demand.
news.headline: Circle, the issuer of USDC, starts trading on NYSE after back-to-back IPO upsizings due to high demand.

news.summary: In Norway, on June 5, 2025, Höegh Evi and Aker BP received an Approval in Principle (AiP) from DNV for a cutting-edge liquefied CO₂ (LCO₂) carrier. This innovative vessel, created by Höegh Evi, Aker BP, and Moss Maritime, is intended for the transportation of captured CO₂.
news.headline: Höegh Evi, Aker BP awarded DNV AiP for new CO₂ carrier designed in Norway for transporting captured CO₂.

news.summary: A clash between Elon Musk and President Trump has resulted in the creation of a negative meme and a new cryptocurrency named Kill Big Beautiful Bill (KBBB) Solana.
news.headline: Trump, Musk feud leads to $53M Solana meme coin, Kill Big Beautiful Bill, after clash over DOGE.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, the Baltimore Community Foundation and Greater Baltimore Committee, along with partners like the Latino Economic Development Center, Anne Arundel County Economic Development Corporation, and Baltimore Community Lending, are committed to bolstering long-term regional recovery efforts. This collaborative initiative signifies a significant investment in the community, showcasing a strong dedication to revitalization. This joint effort brings together various stakeholders to pave the way for sustainable growth and economic development in the region, with a focus on driving positive change and fostering resilience. The organizations involved are pooling resources and expertise to ensure that the region emerges stronger, with a combined investment totaling [specific amount]. This unified approach highlights the collective commitment to building a more vibrant and prosperous future for Baltimore and its surrounding areas.
news.headline: $3M in grants given to 66 small businesses impacted by Key Bridge collapse in Baltimore for regional recovery efforts.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in New York, a significant development is set to take place at the United Nations Ocean Conference 2025. This groundbreaking initiative involves the introduction of a worldwide system of Ocean Centres aimed at prioritizing safety during the transition to a sustainable blue economy in developing ocean-based economies. The network of Ocean Centres is being implemented to ensure the well-being of these economies as they embrace sustainable practices and promote responsible use of ocean resources.
news.headline: Global network of Ocean Centres to promote safety in blue economy of emerging ocean economies, launched at United Nations Ocean Conference 2025.

news.summary: Claroty, a leading CPS protection company, has unveiled enhanced features on its SaaS-based platform, Claroty xDome, that allow organizations to prioritize CPS remediation efforts according to their potential impact on business outcomes. The new capabilities were introduced in New York on June 5, 2025. This advancement enables businesses to focus their resources on addressing critical CPS issues accurately.
news.headline: Claroty's new approach helps CPS risk reduction by prioritizing remediation efforts based on potential impact.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona, it was reported that Computer Guidance Corporation, a top producer of cloud-based ERP solutions for the construction sector, shared news of a strategic move. The announcement highlighted J.F. Brennan Company's (Brennan) successful adoption of a real-time integration system. Brennan, recognized for its specialization in marine construction, was noted for leveraging this solution developed by Computer Guidance Corporation.
news.headline: Computer Guidance Corp integrates ERP with Autodesk Build for J.F. Brennan Company; a leading construction firm.

news.summary: Rently, a prominent provider of self-touring, smart access, and home automation solutions for rentals, has unveiled an extension of its smart access range with a fresh selection of security and surveillance offerings. The introduction of strategically placed security cameras within multi-unit residential buildings is deemed essential for fostering secure communities. These cameras offer residents peace of mind, contribute to increased occupancy rates and reduced turnover, and ultimately serve as a deterrent to unwanted activities.
news.headline: Rently introduces security and surveillance solutions to enhance smart access, focused on multifamily complexes.

news.summary: Barings, a prominent investment manager, and Crebrid, previously known as Wildcat Lending, unveiled a fresh credit facility aimed at enhancing Crebrid's lending activities in the U.S. The agreement entails Barings' investors gaining a minority equity stake in Crebrid as well as offering a flow pur to support the company's growth. Crebrid, the rapidly expanding real estate lending platform, is set to benefit significantly from this collaboration, catering to its increasing credit needs. This strategic move is expected to accelerate Crebrid's credit origination activities nationwide, solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Barings and Crebrid partner with $500M initial capacity for residential lending to accelerate growth across US.

news.summary: A technology company based in Menlo Park, California, Uptick, which offers job management software for professionals in fields such as fire, safety, security, and field services, revealed a significant development. They have secured a strategic growth investment from PSG, a prominent growth equity firm with expertise in collaborating with software and technology-driven service enterprises to leverage exponential growth opportunities. The investment from PSG is intended to bolster Uptick's dedication to enhancing product offerings and furthering its reach globally, particularly concentrating on accelerating operations in North America.
news.headline: Uptick receives strategic growth investment from PSG to fuel innovation and global expansion, focusing on North America growth.

news.summary: Frontdoor, Inc., the parent company of American Home Shield and a top provider of home warranties, revealed the names of the winners of the American Home Shield 2025 Contractor Quality Awards. These five winners, who are preferred contractors, were chosen for their exceptional customer quality ratings and for completing a minimum number of service requests for American Home Shield. The selection process also took into consideration feedback from AHS field representatives. Frontdoor, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FTDR.
news.headline: Frontdoor awards 5 contractors for quality service based on customer ratings, completing a minimum no. of service requests.

news.summary: Lone Star Funds revealed its latest acquisition agreement today, stating that an associate of Lone Star Real Estate Fund VII, L.P. is set to buy nine Purpose-Built Student Accommodation ("PBSA") properties in the UK from Unite Students. The deal, valued at £212 million, includes a portfolio of 3,656 beds spread across nine premium PBSA assets. Unite Students, a leading PBSA owner, manager, and developer in the UK, is the seller in this transaction. The completion of this purchase is expected in August 2025.
news.headline: Lone Star Funds buying nine PBSA assets in the UK from Unite for £212 million, totaling 3,656 beds, closing in August 2025.

news.summary: In New York, VTS revealed a surge in adoption rates for its resident experience solution, VTS Activate Multifamily. This platform, which connects real estate stakeholders such as owners, operators, brokers, and customers, has seen a remarkable increase in usage. Numerous prominent landlords have opted for VTS Activate Multifamily as their preferred resident experience solution. This development signifies substantial expansion for VTS and a notable uptick in key metrics.
news.headline: VTS Activate Multifamily is now leading in resident tech, with record adoption among top landlords.
ECB'S LAGARDE: DETERMINED TO FINISH TERM AT ECB

news.summary: Today, Nodal Exchange reported breaking records in power and environmental futures trading. In May, the exchange achieved a new high in power futures, with a traded volume of 258 million MWh, marking a 5% increase from May 2024's 245 million MWh. Nodal remains the dominant player in North American power futures, holding a 57% share of open interest by the end of May. This amounted to 1.493 billion MWh in open interest, equating to a notional value of $146 billion.
news.headline: Nodal Exchange sets new record trading volume in power and environmental markets, with 258 million MWh traded in May.

news.summary: Linde, a company based in Houston, has revealed plans to expand its carbon dioxide (CO₂) production facility in Freeport, Texas. This expansion involves building a second CO₂ liquefaction plant. Scheduled to be operational in 2027, this new plant will double the capacity of the current facility. The liquefaction plant will process crude CO₂ captured from MEGlobal America Inc.’s Oyster Creek ethylene glycol facility. Linde already supplies oxygen to this facility from its air separation plant in Freeport. This expansion is aimed at meeting the increasing industry demand for a stable supply of CO₂.
news.headline: Linde to double CO2 capacity in Freeport, Texas, by 2027, to meet industry demand.

news.summary: In KITCHENER, Ontario, a notable company in WiFi customer experience solutions, RouteThis, revealed that their Co-Founder and CEO, Jason Moore, achieved the prestigious 2025 Fiber Under Forty Award by the Fiber Broadband Association. The award, presented during the FBA Awards Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025 in Nashville, Tennessee, recognizes young talents under the age of forty making noteworthy impacts on the fiber broadband sector at an early stage of their careers. This accolade highlights Moore's outstanding contributions to the industry.
news.headline: RouteThis CEO Jason Moore wins Fiber Broadband Association’s 2025 “Fiber Under Forty” Award at Fiber Connect 2025 in Nashville.

news.summary: Helios Technologies, a publicly traded company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HLIO, based in Sarasota, Florida, has recently announced the continuation of its streak of quarterly dividend payments. This marks the 114th consecutive cash dividend issued by the company.
news.headline: Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO) declared its 114th consecutive cash dividend, maintaining a long history of quarterly dividends.

news.summary: In Jackson, Wyoming, Greybull Stewardship revealed its recent acquisition of VSSTA, Inc., a company specializing in technological and automated solutions for the collision repair sector. The private investment firm collaborates with small, established businesses to aid in their expansion. VSSTA offers a range of services to help automotive collision repair shops perform accurate and secure repairs. The financial details of the acquisition were not disclosed publicly.
news.headline: Greybull Stewardship acquires VSSTA, Inc., a collision repair solutions provider, terms undisclosed.
EU council: ‘Today, the Council approved the new protection status for wolves, shifting from 'strictly protected' to 'protected.' ‘

news.summary: Forescout Technologies, a key player in cybersecurity, has revealed a new partnership with Coalfire to expedite the FedRAMP Authorization to Operate (ATO) procedures for Forescout Cloud Services. This move aims to enhance Forescout's ongoing provision of affordable security solutions for numerous US federal civilian and DoD entities. The collaboration leverages Forescout's extensive two-decade experience in this field. The objective is to aid these agencies in upgrading their cybersecurity defenses to align with the Federal Zero Trust Strategy.
news.headline: Forescout partners with Coalfire for FedRAMP-Authorized cybersecurity solutions; helps US public sector agencies.

news.summary: A new development from SAN MATEO, California on June 5, 2025, discloses that GoPro, Inc. (NASDAQ: GPRO) has appointed Mike Dennison to its Board of Directors. The board welcomed Dennison on June 3, 2025. This addition is part of GoPro's strategic moves to enhance its leadership team and marks a significant step in its governance structure.
news.headline: GoPro appoints Mike Dennison to Board of Directors on June 3, 2025. Exciting addition to their team.
